lesson.subtitle: Aula 12 -- Getting Around the City
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Marlene Landucci | Aula 12 -- Getting Around the City

listenings.text: Welcome to the city center. The information desk is happy to help you find your way. To reach the main square, walk straight down this street for two blocks. At the second traffic light, turn left. The square is on your right, across from the old church. The famous fountain is in the middle of the square. If you want the museum, it is next to the fountain, behind the cafe. The bus stop is on the corner, near the crosswalk. Please be careful and use the crosswalk to cross the street. Enjoy your visit to our beautiful city.

Hi Marlene, this is your friend Sofia. I am waiting for you near the main square. Let me give you directions from your hotel. When you leave the hotel, turn right and walk straight for one block. At the traffic light, cross the street at the crosswalk. Then keep going straight until you see a big fountain. I am sitting at the cafe on the corner, across from the fountain. It is between the bookshop and the bank. See you soon. Call me if you are lost.

extra_audio.text: First, you leave the hotel and turn right onto the main street. Then you walk straight for two blocks. After that, you stop at the traffic light and cross the street at the crosswalk. Next, you keep going straight until you reach the square. Finally, you find the cafe on the corner, across from the fountain.
